AdapterSetting.Name: Hold WorldEase Consolidations
AdapterSetting.Description: If enabled, any new WorldEase Consolidations will be created in a hold status. All shipments added to the consolidation will be shipped with a closeout mode of Hold until the group is changed to Release.
AdapterSetting.Note: Before making changes, please make sure that all WorldEase groups are closed.
